/** * @fileoverview Default CLIEngineOptions. * @author Ian VanSchooten */ "use strict"; module.exports = { configFile: null, baseConfig: false, rulePaths: [], useEslintrc: true, envs: [], globals: [], extensions: null, ignore: true, ignorePath: void 0, cache: false, /* * in order to honor the cacheFile option if specified * this option should not have a default value otherwise * it will always be used */ cacheLocation: "", cacheFile: ".eslintcache", cacheStrategy: "metadata", fix: false, allowInlineConfig: true, reportUnusedDisableDirectives: void 0, globInputPaths: true, };
